content: Configure Password Strength Settings to enforce more secure, computation-resistant passwords.

comment.text: Configure Password Strength Settings to enforce more secure, computation-resistant passwords. This message is used in a security settings category, where users can enable password strength settings and learn how it applies.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the specific technical concept 'computation-resistant' (resistant to brute-force or computational attacks), which is a key part of the security description.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: تهيئة إعدادات قوة كلمة المرور لفرض كلمات مرور أكثر أمانًا ومقاومة للحوسبة.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'computation-resistant' is translated simply as 'устойчиви' (resistant), which loses the technical meaning of being resistant to computational attacks (brute-force/cracking).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Конфигурирайте Настройките за Сила на Паролата, за да наложите по-сигурни, устойчиви на изчисления пароли.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'computation-resistant' is translated as 'zuverlässige' (reliable), which completely changes the technical meaning. 'Computation-resistant' refers to passwords that are difficult to crack via brute-force or computational attacks, not just 'reliable' ones.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Konfigurieren Sie die Einstellungen für die Passwortstärke, um sicherere, rechenresistente Passwörter zu erzwingen.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'computation-resistant' is translated as 'resistentes a los cálculos', which in Spanish implies resistance to mathematical calculations or arithmetic, rather than resistance to computational attacks (brute-force/cracking).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Configure los ajustes de seguridad de la contraseña para imponer contraseñas más seguras y resistentes a ataques computacionales.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'computation-resistant' is translated simply as 'resistenti' (resistant), losing the specific technical meaning of being resistant to computational attacks/cracking.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Configura le impostazioni di complessità della password per applicare password più sicure e resistenti agli attacchi computazionali.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation 'pentru a crea parole puternice și le securiza' is grammatically incorrect in Romanian and fails to capture the technical nuance of 'computation-resistant'. The phrase 'și le securiza' is ungrammatical (should be 'și a le securiza' or similar) and 'computation-resistant' is omitted.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Configurați setările de complexitate a parolei pentru a impune parole mai sigure și rezistente la atacuri prin forță brută.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'computation-resistant' is translated as 'odpornih na vdore' (intrusion-resistant), which changes the technical meaning from resisting computational attacks (like brute-force/cracking) to resisting general intrusions.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Konfigurirajte nastavitve moči gesla za uveljavljanje varnejših, računalniško odpornih gesel.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the concept of 'computation-resistant' (抗计算/抗暴力破解), which is a key technical security feature mentioned in the English source.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 配置密码强度设置，以强制执行更安全、具有抗计算能力的密码。
